_comment: Mutation testing = grade the tests themselves. Stryker injects bugs into source and reports the % the jest suite KILLS (the trust score). Scoped to the modules the fast jest suite actually covers; the WASM/DOM migration modules (mupdfEdit/mupdfSpans/insertEditor) have ~0% jest coverage and are guarded by the selfcheck + agentic harness instead (too slow for per-mutant runs). Run: npx stryker run
